summary: Frontend testing for Bulk Credit Upload feature in Admin Orders → Credit Management tab. All 8 test cases passed successfully: (1) Modal opens with correct data-testids, (2) Mode selector (Replace/Top-up) works, (3) Download CSV template and Export current buttons present, (4) File upload with validation preview shows valid/invalid rows correctly, (5) Top-up mode adds to existing credit, (6) Paste CSV fallback works, (7) Header auto-detection maps shuffled columns, (8) Missing required column shows error and disables submit.
critical_code_review_comments: BulkCreditUpload.js: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented (bulk-upload-modal, bulk-mode-replace, bulk-mode-topup, download-template-btn, export-current-btn, bulk-upload-dropzone, bulk-upload-file-input, bulk-upload-preview, bulk-upload-submit, bulk-upload-textarea, bulk-upload-paste-parse)
BulkCreditUpload.js: Header auto-detection via HEADER_ALIASES works correctly - maps 'limit' to 'credit_limit'
BulkCreditUpload.js: Row validation correctly identifies invalid email and non-numeric credit_limit
BulkCreditUpload.js: Preview table shows row-level validation with green OK/red error status
BulkCreditUpload.js: Submit button correctly shows count of valid wallets only
AdminOrders.js: Credit Management tab correctly integrates BulkCreditUpload component
AdminOrders.js: Wallets grouped by lender with totals displayed correctly
orders_router.py: POST /api/orders/credit/wallets/bulk-upload correctly handles both 'replace' and 'topup' modes
seed_data_creation: Created 4 test wallets during testing: bulk_test_1@example.com (Stride, ₹150,000), bulk_test_4@example.com (Muthoot, ₹250,000), bulk_test_paste@example.com (Direct, ₹80,000), bulk_test_shuffled@example.com (Direct, ₹75,000)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Credit Upload feature fully tested and working. Test wallets created with bulk_test_* prefix can be cleaned up by main agent. All UI elements have proper data-testid attributes for automated testing.

features_verified.mode_selector_topup: PASS - data-testid=bulk-mode-topup works, can be selected
features_verified.export_current_btn: PASS - data-testid=export-current-btn present, disabled when no wallets
features_verified.validation_valid_rows: PASS - Valid rows show green 'OK' status
features_verified.validation_invalid_email: PASS - Invalid email shows red 'invalid email' error
features_verified.validation_invalid_credit_limit: PASS - Non-numeric credit_limit shows red 'credit_limit not a number' error
features_verified.submit_button_count: PASS - Shows 'Upload X wallets' with correct valid count
features_verified.submit_button_disabled: PASS - Disabled when no valid rows or missing required columns
features_verified.bulk_upload_replace_mode: PASS - Creates new wallets with balance = credit_limit
features_verified.bulk_upload_topup_mode: PASS - Adds to existing credit_limit and balance (100,000 + 50,000 = 150,000)
features_verified.missing_required_column_error: PASS - Shows 'Missing required columns: email' banner
features_verified.wallets_grouped_by_lender: PASS - Stride, Muthoot, Direct groups displayed correctly
features_verified.toast_notifications: PASS - Success toasts show 'X created, Y updated' summary
